3198630.name: Fractured Memories
3198630.description:
Fractured Memories is a card battling game with true real time action. No waiting for turns, no reading cards, no combos that take several minutes to complete. Based on Kingdom Hearts: Chain of Memories, FracturedMemories looks to surpass it by expanding and updating its basis by adding in new combos, new cards, and implementing the ever-popular roguelike genre.

Story Mode: Fight to save the universe by battling across multiple worlds with even more visual themes as you restore the world to their original state. Pursue and stop the mysterious force corrupting all worlds and save the universe!

Tower Mode: Fight increasingly difficult enemies and bosses in the roguelike tower mode! Select from a premade, or draft your own deck form random cards. collect relics that can boost or define your deck and playstyle. Also available in an infinite mode.
3198630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
